description_long: This is a tall, rectangular obelisk constructed from light-colored stone blocks, rising from a square base that is heavily covered in graffiti and painted messages. The base features a prominent sculpted figure seated at one corner, adding a distinct artistic and commemorative element. The obelisk shaft is relatively plain, with some faint inscriptions and graffiti visible along its height, and it tapers slightly as it rises. The base is set on a larger, flat stone platform that extends outward, providing a stable foundation and a transition to the surrounding pavement. The overall appearance is weathered and urban, with the graffiti and painted text giving it a contemporary, lived-in character. The monument stands as a striking vertical landmark, likely serving as a memorial or historical marker in a public urban space.
description: A tall, light stone obelisk with a graffiti-covered square base and a sculpted figure seated at one corner, set on a broad stone platform.
description_view_0: This view highlights the sculpted figure seated at the front left corner of the base and shows extensive graffiti and painted messages on the lower section.
description_view_1: The side of the obelisk is visible, with more graffiti and a large orange-painted message, and the sculpted figure is less prominent.
description_view_2: The sculpted figure is again visible but from a different angle, and the graffiti on the base is clearly seen, especially the orange and white text.
description_view_3: The rear of the obelisk is shown, with the sculpted figure mostly obscured and graffiti continuing around the base.
attribute_inscription: Multiple graffiti inscriptions and painted messages in various colors and styles cover the base, with some faint, possibly original, inscriptions higher up the shaft. The text is mostly in Spanish and is generally legible, though some is obscured by overlapping paint.
attribute_ornamentation: A sculpted figure is seated at one corner of the base, providing a notable decorative and commemorative element. No other ornamentation is visible on the shaft.
attribute_base_design: The base is a square stone structure, robust and slightly raised, with all sides covered in graffiti and painted messages. One corner features a detailed sculpted figure, and the base sits atop a larger, flat stone platform.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is simple and pointed, with no visible ornamentation or unique features, maintaining a classic obelisk form.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a broad, flat stone platform that extends outward, providing a stable foundation. No fences, vegetation, or additional objects are immediately adjacent.
